name: Boss is mad I filed after slip and fall, can he fire me?
description: Protected by law—retaliation allows separate lawsuit.

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed after slip and fall, can he fire me?

acceptedAnswer.text: Protected by law—retaliation allows separate lawsuit.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, Utah and Idaho protect you from retaliation for filing legitimate workers' comp claims.** Firing for it violates law, allowing wrongful termination suit.[1] Key factors: (1) Document threats/changes; (2) Timing proves retaliation; (3) Remedies include back pay. Keep working if possible. Consult attorney immediately for protection.
